---
title: Publications
---

## Journal Articles

1. **Liu, Y.**, Wang, H., Lee, H. P., & Raju, K. (2026). Coupled moisture-mechanical prediction of compression failure of CFRP laminates. *International Journal of Mechanical Sciences, 309*, 111028. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijmecsci.2025.111028

2. **Liu, Y.**, Lin, J., Wang, H., & Fei, S. (2026). Degradation and Strength Prediction of CFRP Under Hygrothermal-Mechanical Coupling Environment. *Polymer Composites, 47*, 499–516. https://doi.org/10.1002/pc.70161

3. **Liu, Y.**, Wang, W., Wang, H., Ding, H., Cheng, L., Wang, H., & Bi, Y. (2025). Investigation of the hygrothermal effects on in-plane failure mechanisms of fine Z-pinned laminates. *Journal of Composite Materials, 59*(5), 627–641. https://doi.org/10.1177/00219983241295450

4. Lin, J., **Liu, Y.**, Yu, Y., Zuo, X., Ding, H., Wang, H., Bi, Y., & Wang, H. (2025). Moisture absorption characterization and mechanical properties of CFRP under the combined effects of seawater and continuous bending stress. *Applied Composite Materials, 32*, 2013–2033. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10443-024-10254-9

5. **Liu, Y.**, Lu, J., Zhang, H., Wang, H., Wang, H., & Bi, Y. (2024). Impact resistance optimization of composite laminates based on variable-fidelity surrogate model. *Polymer Composites, 45*(17), 16075–16096. https://doi.org/10.1002/pc.28891

6. **Liu, Y.**, Wang, H., Ding, H., Wang, H., & Bi, Y. (2024). Effect of Hygrothermal Aging on Compression Behavior of CFRP Material with Different Layups. *Composites Part B: Engineering, 270*, 111134. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compositesb.2023.111134

7. **Liu, Y.**, Wang, H., Du, J., Lin, J., Cao, Y., & Cheng, L. (2023). Comparative Experimental Study on Mechanical Properties of CFRP Subjected to Seawater and Hydrostatic Pressure. *Composites Science and Technology, 242*, 110193. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.compscitech.2023.110193

8. **Liu, Y.**, Wang, H., Zhang, F., Cheng, L., Qu, W., & Wang, Q. (2023). Experimental and simulation study on compressive failure evolution of multidirectional laminates with different dimensions. *Engineering Failure Analysis, 154*, 107633. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.engfailanal.2023.107633

9. **Liu, Y.**, Cai, L., Ding, H., & Xu, Q. (2023). Out-of-plane properties and failure mechanism of composite laminates reinforced with carbon Z-pins. *Applied Composite Materials, 30*(2), 379–397. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10443-022-10087-4

## Patents

1. 王晗，**刘宇驰**，林锦路. (2025). 外力耦合作用下复合材料压缩性能测试工装及模拟方法 [P]. CN119985141A.

2. 何汝明，**刘宇驰**，王晗. (2025). 复杂曲面复材双阶段铺放路径规划集成优化方法 [P]. CN120145782A.
